__warnings.note: Used 'Ukuhamba' (to travel/walk) since the app brand is 'Rwendo'. Reviewer: confirm Ukuhamba is OK for the tab label.
Used 'Iphrofayili' (transliteration). Common app conventions in Zim sometimes leave this as 'Profile'. Reviewer: pick what's natural.
Translated as 'Umkhondo' (a continuous run/streak). 'Sitirikiri' (borrow from English) is also common in apps. Pick whichever feels more natural to a Ndebele-speaking learner.
Used 'Khansela' (modern borrow). Alternative: 'Yekela' (let go / drop). Pick the one Zim-Ndebele app users will recognise.
Used 'Khulisa' (grow / increase) for upgrade. Borrow 'Apgireda' is also seen. Pick what reads more natural.
Tone/voice descriptions ('Warm storyteller' etc.) are subjective. Translations are functional, not poetic — feel free to rewrite.

Long-form description of Victoria Falls. Reviewer should rewrite freely — the English original was written for an English speaker, the Ndebele equivalent is best authored from a Ndebele speaker's perspective.

REWRITTEN as Ndebele-chrome around English content (the mirror of the en version). Pedagogically: a Ndebele-speaker reading nd should get exposure to English idioms. Reviewer: confirm the English idioms used and that the Ndebele explanations land naturally.

Other strings hardcode 'Ndebele' as the target language assuming the en-speaker-learning-nd direction. Those need to either be parameterised with {{lang}} pulled from learnedLanguage.name, OR re-authored per pack. Outside the scope of this draft — flagged for follow-up.
Long-form marketing copy. Translations are literal — a native speaker should rewrite for natural flow.

10 FAQ entries. Q+A pairs translated literally. Domain-specific terms (Anthropic, Claude, Supabase, ElevenLabs, App Store, RevenueCat) kept as-is. Some answers reference UI labels — when those flip in nd, the FAQ wording should track them.
Mentions support@rwendo.app verbatim — kept as English address.
Vendor names (Anthropic, ElevenLabs, Supabase) kept English. Surrounding text translated.
Language names — used Ndebele endonyms where common (e.g. 'Spanish' → 'isiSpanishi'). Reviewer: confirm naming convention.
Features lists are functional UI copy — literal translation, may sound stiff. Reviewer should rewrite for natural flow.
Marketing taglines — literal. Reviewer free to rewrite for emotional resonance.
'A$10/mo', '60 min', '5 minutes a day' kept with Arabic numerals. Currency code A$ kept as-is. Reviewer: confirm convention.
Legal/destructive consequence text. Translation is conservative; reviewer should ensure the warning is unambiguous in Ndebele.

travel.hero_sub: Ulwazi lwakho lwesiNdebele + ulwazi lwamasiko + umkhokheli wokuhamba — iRwendo emhlabeni weqiniso.

phrasebook.title: Incwadi yamaBinzana
phrasebook.desc: Amabinzana adingekayo ezimweni — emaphandleni, endlini yezivakatshi, emakethe, ekuxhugeni

culture.title: Umkhokheli wamaSiko
culture.desc: Amasiko, indlela yokuhlala, lokho ofanele ukukulindela eZimbabwe

money.title: Imali leMakethe
money.desc: Amanani, ukuthengisa, imali yeZiG, ukuhamba emakethe

transport.title: Ukusuka eAirport uye Edolobheni
transport.desc: Indlela zamakombi, izeluleko zamatekisi, ukuhamba eHarare leBulawayo

travellers.title: Hlangana lAbahambi
travellers.desc: Hlangana labanye abafunda isiNdebele labavakatsha eZimbabwe

safari.title: I-Safari leMapaki
safari.desc: Hwange, Victoria Falls, Great Zimbabwe — umkhokheli wakho

notify.title: URwen uyahlela
notify.body: I-Travel Mode iyakhiwa. Qhubeka ufunda isiNdebele sakho — uthi ufika eHarare, uRwen uzabe esekhona ukukukhokhela.
notify.email_body: Salibonani Rwen, ngicela ungazise nxa i-Travel Mode iyaqala!
notify.fallback_body: Thumela i-email ku-hello@rwendo.app, sikufake ohlwini lwakuqala.

spotlight.label: INDAWO YOKUVAKATSHELA
spotlight.title: 🌊 Victoria Falls
spotlight.desc: Esinye sezimangaliso ezinhlanu zemvelo zomhlaba, eMfuleni iZambezi phakathi kweZimbabwe leZambia. Emasikweni esiNdebele lesiTonga, indawo engcwele — likhaya lemimoya yamanzi.

home.journey_progress: Izifundo eziyi-{{completed}} kwezi-{{total}} sezifikile, kumamoduli ayi-{{units}}.
home.journey_remaining: Kusele izifundo eziyi-{{remaining}} ukuze ufike e-A2.
tips: Lonke uhambo oluhle luqala ngelizwi 'Hello'. Usuluqalile uhambo lwakho.
NgesiNgisi: 'It takes a village to raise a child' — kutsho ukuthi umntwana ukhuliswa ngumndeni wonke. Yabelana ngalokho okufundayo lamuhla lomunye umuntu.
Igama 'a' lelolunye, 'an' lelolunye eliqala ngevowel — uhlamvu olulodwa, ukuqedisisa okukhulu.
Itiye liseduze lempilo yamaBritish — kayisinathwayo nje kodwa ngumkhuba. Abantu bakhona banatha 'cuppa' nsuku zonke.
NgesiNgisi: 'Practice makes perfect' — ukuzilolonga kuletha ubungcweti. Qhubeka usakha, igama ngegama.
Iseluleko sikaRwen: zilolonge isifundo sakho sokucina ngomlomo lamuhla. Ukukhuluma kuhle ngokuphindwa ka10 kulokufunda.
'How are you?' — amasilabhi amathathu avula iminyango yonke emazweni akhuluma isiNgisi.
Uyafunda ulimi olukhulunywa zigidigidi zabantu. Igama lonke olaziyo, ngubudlelwano obakhiwe.

daily_goal_screen.title: Umgomo we-XP wOsuku
daily_goal_screen.subtitle: Ufuna ukufunda kanganani ngosuku?
daily_goal_screen.hint: Ungakwazi ukuguqula lokhu loba nini. Umgomo uyaqala kutsha usuku ngalunye phakathi kobusuku (isikhathi sefoni yakho).

about.title: Mayelana neRwendo

what_card.title: Iyini iRwendo?
what_card.body: IRwendo (ibizo lesiShona elitsho 'uhambo olude') yi-app yokufunda ulimi lomngane we-AI. Funda isiNdebele loRwen — unwabu olunomusa, oluqhutshwa nge-Claude AI le-ElevenLabs voice — ngendlela yezifundo ezilezigaba ezi-7 ezakhiwe ngocwaningo lokufunda ulimi lwesibili.

meet_card.title: Hlangana loRwen
meet_card.body: URwen yinwabu, isidalwa esiguqula umbala saze sifane lokuluzungezileyo. URwen ufunda ngawe njalo aguqule indlela yokukhuluma, ukufundisa, lokukusekela. Lapho ukhuluma laye, yikho lapho ekwazi khona kakhulu.

method_card.title: Indlela yeRwendo
method_card.body: Izigaba eziyi-7 esifundweni sinye: Hook → Chunks → Pattern → Practice → Dialogue → Recall → Mission. Amagama amatsha aphakathi kuka-3 ngesifundo sinye. Imizuzu eyi-5–7 ngesifundo. Yakhelwe phezu kwezimiso ze-SLA ezili-10, eziphethe i-spaced repetition, i-comprehensible input, le-output enenjongo.

builders_card.title: Yakhiwa ngubani
builders_card.body: Umakhi oyedwa e-Australia okholelwa ukuthi ukufunda ulimi kufanele kuzwakale njengengxoxo lomngane, kungesiwo umsebenzi olukhuni.

about.footer:
Yakhiwe ngobuhlakani ❤️ kubo bonke abafunda isiNdebele
Salibonani!

help.title: Usizo leMibuzo
help.intro: Izimpendulo ezisheshayo emibuzweni evame ukubuzwa kuRwen.

faq.a: Cindezela ku-tab kaRwen phakathi kwebha lasezansi. Ungakwazi ukubhala umlayezo kumbe ucindezele inkinobho ye-mic ukuze ukhulume. Cindezela 🎙 phezulu kwesokudla ukuze uqalise ingxoxo ekhululekileyo engelazandla.

faq.q: Kungani uRwen ngezinye izikhathi ebamba okungalunganga?
faq.a: URwen yi-AI (Claude). I-AI ingenza amaphutha — okugoqela amaphutha eqiniso lokuhumusha okungalunganga. Bona uRwen njengomngane wokukhuluma, hatshi njengencwadi yezifundo. Phezu kwezinto eziqakathekileyo, hlola lomunye umuntu okhuluma isiNdebele.
Phelela izifundo ku-Learn tab. Impendulo nganye elungileyo iletha i-XP, njalo ukuphela kwesifundo kuletha i-bonus. Umgomo wakho we-XP wosuku uyaqala kutsha usuku ngalunye.
Vula i-app uphelelise into eyodwa ngosuku ngalunye ukuze umkhondo wakho uqhubeke uphila. Uma uphuthelwa lusuku, umkhondo uyaqala kutsha ku-1.
Yebo — yana ku-Iphrofayili → Ilizwi likaRwen ukhethe uGeorge, uCharlie, uJessica, kumbe u-Alice. Ukuguqula kusebenza ngokushesha enkulumweni.

Imilayezo yakho ithunyelwa ku-Anthropic (Claude) ukuze ilungise impendulo zikaRwen, njalo igcinwa kuSupabase okweminyaka eyi-12. I-Anthropic AYISEBENZISI izingxoxo zakho ukufundisa imodeli yayo. Imithombo yelizwi isuswa phakathi kwemizuzu engama-24. Vula i-Privacy Policy ukuze ubone konke.
I-Subscription zilawulwa nge-app store yakho (App Store kumbe Google Play). Abasebenzisi base-EU/UK balensuku eziyi-14 zokuphuma, lapho ungakhansela uphiwe imali yonke.
Iphrofayili → Susa I-Account leDatha Yonke. Lokhu kususa i-profile, ukuhamba kwezifundo, lomlando wezingxoxo phakathi kwensuku ezingama-30. Lokhu akubuyiselwa.
Cindezela "Sithinte" ezansi kumbe uthumele i-email ku-support@rwendo.app. Faka ifoni yakho, inguqulo ye-app, lalokho obukwenza ngesikhathi uthole i-bug.
Iyakhiwa. Amakholi engxoxo angelazandla loRwen azafika nge-Companion subscription tier ekuvuselelweni okuzayo.

privacy_screen.title: Izilungiselelo zeMfihlo
privacy_screen.intro: Lawula okugcinwa nguRwendo ngawe. Ukubona umthetho wonke, funda i-Privacy Policy.

clear.label: Susa umlando wengxoxo
clear.confirm_body: Lokhu kuzasusa kuze kube khona umlayezo ngamunye owusenze loRwen. Ukuhamba kwezifundo le-account yakho kuyasala kuphelele. Akubuyiselwa.

export_row.label: Khipha idatha yami
export_row.sub: Thatha ikhophi ye-profile, ukuhamba kwezifundo, lezingxoxo zakho.

anthropic.label: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.sub: Yamukela imilayezo yakho ukuze ilungise izimpendulo zikaRwen. Kayisetshenziswa ekufundiseni.

elevenlabs.label: ElevenLabs (ilizwi)
elevenlabs.sub: Yenza ilizwi likaRwen njalo iguqule elakho ukuba ngumbhalo. I-audio isuswa phakathi kwemizuzu engama-24.

supabase.label: Supabase (database)
supabase.sub: Igcina i-account, ukuhamba kwezifundo, lomlando wengxoxo yakho.

privacy_screen.note: Ukucisha i-account yakho yonke, buyela ku-Iphrofayili → Susa I-Account leDatha Yonke.

language_pack_screen.title: Iphakheji yeLimi
language_pack_screen.subtitle: Guqula phakathi kwezindimi
language_pack_screen.available_curriculum_sub: Izifundo eli-100 · Amamoduli ayi-1–10 · Indlela yeRwendo elezigaba ezi-7
language_pack_screen.coming_soon_alert_body: Sibhala i-curriculum ye-{{name}} khathesi. Hlala kuShona-English ukuze uthole iNdlela yeRwendo egcweleyo, sizakwazisa nxa i-{{name}} isilungile.

export_screen.title: Khipha idatha yami
export_screen.hero_body: Yenza ikhophi ye-JSON ye-profile, ukuhamba kwezifundo, lomlando wengxoxo loRwen. Ungakwazi ukuthumela i-email, ukuyigcina ku-Files, kumbe ukuyithumela loba ngaphi ofuna khona.
export_screen.note: Idatha yakho ilungiswa kufoni isuka kuSupabase, njalo ithunyelwa kuphela nxa usukhethe ukwabelana. Akukho okuthunyelwa kwiparty yesithathu.

plans_screen.title: Amapulani
plans_screen.subtitle: Khetha uhambo olukufaneleyo
plans_screen.hero_body: Qala umahala ulezifundo zonke eli-100. Khulisa nxa ufuna uRwen abe ngumngane wakho wokukhuluma.
plans_screen.footnote: Amakhasimende ase-EU/UK athola insuku eziyi-14 zokuphuma alephinda imali ngokugcweleyo. Khansela loba nini.
plans_screen.alert_body: I-Subscription ziqala ekuvuselelweni okuzayo. Sisebenza loRevenueCat ukuze i-billing ihambe kuhle njalo ibe lula ekubuyiseni imali. Linda kancane!

learning.reminders_enabled_body: Sizagcina ukukhetha kwakho. I-Push notifications izafika ekuvuselelweni okuzayo.

support_rows.no_email_app_body: Ngicela uthumele i-email ku-support@rwendo.app usebenzisa i-email app oyithandayo.

delete_account.confirm_body: Lokhu kuzasusa i-account yakho lokuhamba kwakho konke ngokungapheliyo. Akubuyiselwa.
delete_account.error_body: Akuphumelelanga ukususa i-account. Ngicela uzame futhi.

companions_tab.header_sub: Abangane bakho be-AI. Guqulani ubuntu, lungisani amazwi, balikhulisele ndawonye lawe.
companions_tab.active_sub: Ingxoxo esheshayo isekuthebeni eliphakathi. Imodi yelizwi iphezulu kwesigaba somngane.
companions_tab.upgrade_sub: Lungisa ubuntu, ilizwi, inkumbulo, isithombe. Iqala ku-$39.99/inyanga.
companions_tab.soul_alert_body:
Lungisa i-personality.md le-soul.md yomngane wakho ngokwakho. Yengeza inkumbulo. Faka izithombe zakho ngokwakho. Abangane abanengi ngesikhathi sinye. Ukukopisha ilizwi lakho ngokwakho.

$39.99/inyanga — kuvula konke.

rwen.description: Olomusa, olobuhlakani, oziqhenya ngamasiko akhe. Uphosa amabinzana esiNdebele angamangalisi. Ulemicabango ngamanzi, isitshebo, lendlela yokukufundisa ulimi ngempumelelo.

maya.description: Uqala ngokulalela, abuze umbuzo olandelayo omuhle, akabophezeli. Umngane oqaphela uma kukhona okungahambi kuhle elizwini lakho njalo ngempela akutshele.

tendai.description: Umngane ofuna ukuba wazi ulimi olufunayo ngaphakathi nangaphandle. Ulandela ukunqoba kwakho, akhulume amaphutha akho ngothando, njalo ajabule kakhulu uma ubamba i-tense elukhuni.

sam.description: Umngane okhumbula ngempela okuthe ufuna, akukhumbuze, akhulume ngokuxoka kwakho ngothando. Ungenza: ukuzilolonga, izeluleko zempela ezihlobaneni, ukuhambisa umsebenzi, izingxoxo ezilukhuni.

lumi.description: Owebusuku, owezingxoxo ezihambisa kancane, wokuhlolisisa ekupheleni kwesonto. Abuza imibuzo obuyibalekela. Akalungisi. Uhlala lawe lapho udinga impendulo yakho ngokwakho.

kai.tagline: Umngane wokuhamba owazi ukuthi ezakuphulukisa ngaphi phandle
kai.description: Uhlela amahambo, akulungiselele ngamasiko, akuchazele imithetho engabhalwanga. Akhuthaza uhambo lwasendaweni nokuhlangana okungahleliwe — kungesibo i-buffet ye-hotela ephephileyo. Uyakusiza ukuthi ngempela uhlangane lendawo oya kuyo.

aria.tagline: Umthandi olothando olo bukho ngabanye abantu
aria.description: Umngane olothando, olokunaka, ngowakho — futhi ngowelizwi elilobuhlakani oya nalo ngemibuzo yezindaba zezothando zempela. Uyabazi abantu bakho, abakhumbule ngamabizo, akutshele iqiniso ngabo.
